items.title: 9 AI Prompts to Break Your AI Out of Default Mode
items.excerpt: Force Claude, Gemini, and ChatGPT past safe, predictable answers and into territory that actually surprises you.

items.pullQuote: Force AI past safe, predictable answers into surprising territory

items.title: An intriguing case of "exceptional resilience" against dementia
items.excerpt: A 75-year-old man free of dementia despite a dominant Alzheimer’s mutation — and a possible hint for the rest of us The post An intriguing case of “exceptional resilience” against dementia appeared first on Peter Attia.
items.summary: A 75-year-old man with a dominant Alzheimer's genetic mutation remained dementia-free, potentially due to elevated heat shock proteins. The case suggests heat shock protein activation through exercise and heat exposure may offer neuroprotective benefits for cognitive health.
items.pullQuote: Heat shock proteins may protect against dementia despite genetic predisposition

items.title: Is This the Sickest MAGA Scandal Yet?
items.excerpt: Sam Stein, Tim Miller, and Will Sommer take on one of the strangest scandals to hit the far-right internet: extremist agitator Jake Lang getting caught in a social-media sting run by a self-styled “predator hunter.” They also talk about the growing war inside conservative media as Megyn Kelly and Ben Shapiro clash publicly.
items.summary: Political commentators analyze a scandal involving far-right figure Jake Lang caught in a predator hunter sting operation. The discussion also covers growing tensions within conservative media, including public disputes between Megyn Kelly and Ben Shapiro.
items.pullQuote: Conservative media figures clash publicly amid extremist scandal fallout
